name: Southern Fried Chicken by Paul Prudhomme
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine salt, onion powder, black pepper, sage, white pepper, thyme, and garlic powder to make the seasoning mix. Mix well.
2. Sprinkle the seasoning on chicken and rub it in. Seal the chicken in a plastic bag and refrigerate overnight if possible.
3. Remove the chicken from the refrigerator at least 1 hour before cooking.
4. Place flour in a pie pan and set aside.
5. In a wide shallow bowl, beat eggs and milk and set aside.
6. Heat oil to 375 degrees in a large deep skillet.
7. Just before frying, dredge each piece of chicken in flour, shaking off the excess.
8. Immediately place the chicken in the egg mixture and back into flour again.
9. Place the chicken in hot oil in a single layer and fry until crisp. Turn only once.
